"CSA_Star_Base_4", Parameter_Type = "CSA_Star_Base_5", Parameter_Type = "EotH_Star_Base_1", Parameter_Type = "EotH_Star_Base_2", Parameter_Type = "EotH_Star_Base_3", Parameter_Type = Equations.EnemyForce_No_Shipyard: (Variable_Self.EnemyForceUnnormalized {Parameter_Attenuator = 1.0} + Variable_Enemy.ReinforcementsUnnormalized) - ( 1500 * Variable_Enemy.HasUnit {Parameter_Type = "NewRepublic_Shipyard_Level_One", Parameter_Type = "Empire_Shipyard_Level_One", Parameter_Type = "Pentastar_Shipyard_Level_One", Parameter_Type = "Zsinj_Shipyard_Level_One", Parameter_Type = "Eriadu_Shipyard_Level_One", Parameter_Type = "Greater_Maldrood_Shipyard_Level_One", Parameter_Type = "CSA_Shipyard_Level_One", Parameter_Type = "Chiss_Shipyard_Level_One", Parameter_Type = "EotH_Shipyard_Level_One", Parameter_Type = "Hutt_Shipyard_Level_One", Parameter_Type = "Yevetha_Shipyard_Level_One", Parameter_Type = "Imperial_Proteus_Shipyard_Level_One"} + 2500 * Variable_Enemy.HasUnit {Parameter_Type = "NewRepublic_Shipyard_Level_Two", Parameter_Type = "Empire_Shipyard_Level_Two", Parameter_Type = "Pentastar_Shipyard_Level_Two", Parameter_Type = "Zsinj_Shipyard_Level_Two", Parameter_Type = "Pirate_Base", Parameter_Type = "Eriadu_Shipyard_Level_Two", Parameter_Type = "Greater_Maldrood_Shipyard_Level_Two", Parameter_Type = "CSA_Shipyard_Level_Two", Parameter_Type = "Chiss_Shipyard_Level_Two", Parameter_Type = "EotH_Shipyard_Level_Two", Parameter_Type = "Hutt_Shipyard_Level_Two", Parameter_Type = "Yevetha_Shipyard_Level_Two", Parameter_Type = "Imperial_Proteus_Shipyard_Level_Two"} + 6000 * Variable_Enemy.HasUnit {Parameter_Type = "NewRepublic_Shipyard_Level_Three", Parameter_Type = "Empire_Shipyard_Level_Three", Parameter_Type = "Pentastar_Shipyard_Level_Three", Parameter_Type = "Zsinj_Shipyard_Level_Three", Parameter_Type = "Eriadu_Shipyard_Level_Three", Parameter_Type = "Greater_Maldrood_Shipyard_Level_Three", Parameter_Type = "CSA_Shipyard_Level_Three", Parameter_Type = "CSA_Ship_Market", Parameter_Type = "Chiss_Shipyard_Level_Three", Parameter_Type = "EotH_Shipyard_Level_Three", Parameter_Type = "Hutt_Shipyard_Level_Three", Parameter_Type = "Yevetha_Shipyard_Level_Three", Parameter_Type = "Imperial_Proteus_Shipyard_Level_Three"} + 8500 * Variable_Enemy.HasUnit {Parameter_Type = "NewRepublic_Shipyard_Level_Four", Parameter_Type = "Empire_Shipyard_Level_Four", Parameter_Type = "Pentastar_Shipyard_Level_Four", Parameter_Type = "Zsinj_Shipyard_Level_Four", Parameter_Type = "Rancor_Base", Parameter_Type = "Eriadu_Shipyard_Level_Four", Parameter_Type = "Greater_Maldrood_Shipyard_Level_Four", Parameter_Type = "CSA_Shipyard_Level_Four", Parameter_Type = "Chiss_Shipyard_Level_Four", Parameter_Type = "EotH_Shipyard_Level_Four", Parameter_Type = "Hutt_Shipyard_Level_Four", Parameter_Type = "Yevetha_Shipyard_Level_Four", Parameter_Type = "Imperial_Proteus_Shipyard_Level_Four"} + 5000 * Variable_Enemy.HasUnit {Parameter_Type = "Hapan_Shipyard_Royal", Parameter_Type = "Hapan_Shipyard_Requud", Parameter_Type = "Hapan_Shipyard_AlGray", Parameter_Type = "Hapan_Shipyard_Galney", Parameter_Type = "Hapan_Shipyard_Thane", Parameter_Type = "Hapan_Shipyard_Corr", Parameter_Type = "Hapan_Shipyard_Maluri"} )
Equations.Has_Defense_Stations: Variable_Self.HasUnit { Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Golan_One", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Golan_Two", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Golan_Three", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Valor", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Epineio", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Teichos", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Brask", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Iero", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Etymos", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Visvia", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Meridian_I", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Meridian_II", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Meridian_III", Parameter_Type = "Secondary_Meridian_IV" }
Equations.Has_Interdictor: Variable_Enemy.HasUnit { Parameter_Type = "Interdiction_Minefield", Parameter_Type = "Super_Transport_VII_Interdictor", Parameter_Type = "Prolipsi", Parameter_Type = "Coronal_Fleet_Tender", Parameter_Type = "Interdiction_Minefield_Hapes", Parameter_Type = "Interdictor_Star_Destroyer", Parameter_Type = "Mothma_Star_Destroyer", Parameter_Type = "Sovereign_Star_Dreadnought", Parameter_Type = "Eclipse_Star_Dreadnought", Parameter_Type = "CC7700", Parameter_Type = "CC7700_E", Parameter_Type = "Strike_Interdictor", Parameter_Type = "Immobilizer_418", Parameter_Type = "Immobilizer_418_Refit", Parameter_Type = "Immobilizer_Twin_Well", Parameter_Type = "Isolder_Song_of_War", Parameter_Type = "Alyssia_Starsong", Parameter_Type = "Chelik_Dangerous_Dance", Parameter_Type = "Astarta_Siren_Star", Parameter_Type = "Gray_Kendall", Parameter_Type = "Lovett_Riverlord", Parameter_Type = "Dezon_Constrainer", Parameter_Type = "Phulik_Binder", Parameter_Type = "Wellam_Eternal_Wrath", Parameter_Type = "Iblis_Bail_Organa", Parameter_Type = "Iillor_Corusca_Rainbow", Parameter_Type = "Voota_Splendor", Parameter_Type = "Kaerobani_Interdictor", Parameter_Type = "Lon_Donell_Detainer", Parameter_Type = "Valles_Interdictor", Parameter_Type = "Krieg_Immobilizer", Parameter_Type = "Commander_III_Interdictor_Star_Destroyer" }
Equations.Allowed_To_Retreat_From_Space: Game.IsCampaignGame * Variable_Self.CanRetreat * (1.0 - Variable_Self.IsFaction {Parameter_Faction = "Hostile", Parameter_Faction = "Warlords", Parameter_Faction = "Independent_Forces", Parameter_Faction = "Sector_Forces", Parameter_Faction = "Mandalorians" } )
